The server extracts the userʼs business group membership from their JWT and checks it against an approved list before even establishing a session. This list of approved groups is set during the initial security review when the server is first registered.

对于处理特别敏感数据的服务器，Pinterest 增加了业务组门控。服务器从用户的 JWT 中提取用户的业务组成员身份，并在建立会话之前根据批准的列表进行检查。此批准组列表是在服务器首次注册时的初始安全审查期间设置的。

For example, even though the Presto MCP server is technically reachable from Pinterestʼs broadly used AI chat interface, only specific groups like Ads, Finance, or certain infrastructure teams can actually connect and run queries. This means that turning on a powerful, data-heavy server in a popular surface does not silently expand who can see sensitive data.

例如，尽管 Presto MCP 服务器在技术上可以通过 Pinterest 广泛使用的 AI 聊天界面进行访问，但只有广告、财务或某些基础设施团队等特定群体才能真正连接并运行查询。这意味着在流行的环境中打开功能强大、数据量大的服务器并不会默默地扩大可以看到敏感数据的人。

Why two layers instead of one' Envoyʼs policies are fast, network-level checks that block obviously unauthorized traffic before it reaches any application code. The tool-level decorators handle nuanced, business-logic-specific permissions that a network proxy is not equipped to reason about. Together, they provide defense in depth. Even if one layer has a misconfiguration, the other still catches unauthorized access.

为什么采用两层而不是一层？ Envoy 的策略是快速的网络级检查，可以在明显未经授权的流量到达任何应用程序代码之前将其阻止。工具级装饰器处理网络代理无法推理的细微差别、特定于业务逻辑的权限。它们共同提供纵深防御。即使一层配置错误，另一层仍然会捕获未经授权的访问。

The official MCP specification defines an OAuth 2.0 authorization flow where users authenticate with each MCP server individually, typically involving consent

官方 MCP 规范定义了 OAuth 2.0 授权流程，其中用户分别向每个 MCP 服务器进行身份验证，通常涉及同意

Page 92

screens and per-server token management. Pinterest skipped this entirely. Since they control the entire internal environment, they piggyback on the auth session the user already has when they open an AI surface. There is no additional login prompt or consent dialog when a user invokes an MCP tool.

屏幕和每服务器令牌管理。 Pinterest 完全跳过了这一点。由于它们控制整个内部环境，因此它们会利用用户打开 AI 界面时已有的身份验证会话。当用户调用 MCP 工具时，没有额外的登录提示或同意对话框。

This is simpler for end users, but only works because Pinterest owns every piece of the stack. A company relying on third-party MCP servers would likely need the per-server OAuth approach described in the spec.

这对于最终用户来说更简单，但之所以有效，是因为 Pinterest 拥有堆栈的每一部分。依赖第三方 MCP 服务器的公司可能需要规范中描述的每服务器 OAuth 方法。

Lastly, for automated service-to-service calls where there is no human in the loop, Pinterest uses SPIFFE-based authentication. In this pattern, the calling service proves its identity through a cryptographic certificate issued by the service mesh rather than presenting a humanʼs JWT. Pinterest reserves this for low-risk, read- only scenarios where the blast radius is tightly constrained.

最后，对于循环中无人参与的自动服务到服务调用，Pinterest 使用基于 SPIFFE 的身份验证。在这种模式中，调用服务通过服务网格颁发的加密证书来证明其身份，而不是提供人类的 JWT。 Pinterest 将其保留用于低风险、只读场景，其中爆炸半径受到严格限制。

Meeting Engineers Where They Already Work
在工程师工作的地方会见他们

Pinterest was deliberate about one thing. MCP could not be a science project that lived in its own separate interface. It had to show up in the tools that engineers already use every day.

Pinterest 深思熟虑了一件事。 MCP 不可能是一个存在于其自己独立界面中的科学项目。它必须出现在工程师每天使用的工具中。

The diagram below shows how the MCP integration has been done across various surfaces at Pinterest.

下图显示了如何在 Pinterest 的各个界面上完成 MCP 集成。

Source: Pinterest Engineering Blog
来源：Pinterest 工程博客
Page 93

Pinterestʼs internal AI chat interface is used by the majority of employees daily.

Pinterest 的内部人工智能聊天界面被大多数员工日常使用。

The frontend automatically handles OAuth flows and returns a list of usable MCP tools scoped to the current userʼs permissions. Once connected, the AI agent binds MCP tools directly into its toolset, so invoking an MCP tool feels identical to calling any other built-in capability. From the userʼs perspective, they are just asking the AI to do something, and the MCP plumbing is invisible.

前端自动处理 OAuth 流并返回当前用户权限范围内的可用 MCP 工具列表。连接后，AI 代理会将 MCP 工具直接绑定到其工具集中，因此调用 MCP 工具与调用任何其他内置功能的感觉相同。从用户的角度来看，他们只是要求人工智能做某事，MCP 管道是看不见的。

Pinterest also embeds AI bots in its internal communication platform, and these bots expose MCP tools as well. Auth is handled through the registry API, just like the web interface. These bots support context-aware tool scoping, meaning certain MCP tools are restricted to certain channels. Spark MCP tools, for example, only appear in Airflow support channels. This keeps tool lists relevant to the conversation and prevents users from accidentally invoking tools that do not make sense in a given context.

Pinterest 还在其内部通信平台中嵌入了 AI 机器人，这些机器人也公开了 MCP 工具。身份验证是通过注册表 API 处理的，就像 Web 界面一样。这些机器人支持上下文感知工具范围，这意味着某些 MCP 工具仅限于某些渠道。例如，Spark MCP 工具仅出现在 Airflow 支持渠道中。这使工具列表与对话保持相关，并防止用户意外调用在给定上下文中没有意义的工具。

AI-enabled IDEs can pull data through the Presto MCP server on demand, so agents bring data directly into coding workflows instead of requiring engineers to switch to a separate dashboard. CLI agents provide similar capabilities for terminal-based workflows.

支持 AI 的 IDE 可以按需通过 Presto MCP 服务器提取数据，因此代理将数据直接带入编码工作流程，而不需要工程师切换到单独的仪表板。 CLI 代理为基于终端的工作流程提供类似的功能。

The servers that see the heaviest usage reflect the most common engineering pain points.

使用最频繁的服务器反映了最常见的工程痛点。

The Presto MCP server is consistently the highest-traffic server because data access is a universal need across teams.

Presto MCP 服务器始终是流量最高的服务器，因为数据访问是跨团队的普遍需求。

The Spark MCP server underpins Pinterestʼs AI-assisted debugging
Spark MCP 服务器支持 Pinterest 的人工智能辅助调试

experience, where agents diagnose job failures, summarize logs, and help record structured root-cause analyses, turning noisy operational threads into reusable knowledge.

体验，代理诊断作业失败、总结日志并帮助记录结构化根本原因分析，将嘈杂的操作线程转化为可重用的知识。

The Knowledge MCP server acts as a general-purpose endpoint for institutional knowledge, giving agents the ability to search documentation and answer questions across internal sources.

知识 MCP 服务器充当机构知识的通用端点，使代理能够跨内部来源搜索文档并回答问题。

Since MCP servers enable automated actions, the blast radius of a mistake is larger than if a human manually performed the same steps.

由于 MCP 服务器支持自动操作，因此错误的影响范围比人工执行相同步骤时更大。

Pinterestʼs agent guidance mandates human-in-the-loop approval before any sensitive or expensive action. Agents propose actions, humans approve or reject (optionally in batches) before execution. Pinterest also uses elicitation for

Pinterest 的代理指南要求在采取任何敏感或昂贵的行动之前必须经过人机交互的批准。代理提出行动，人类在执行之前批准或拒绝（可选批量）。 Pinterest 还使用启发式

Page 94

dangerous operations, where the AI explicitly asks the user to confirm before performing something like overwriting data in a table. This is a governance decision.

危险的操作，人工智能在执行诸如覆盖表中的数据之类的操作之前明确要求用户确认。这是一项治理决策。

Measurements Pinterest built observability into the MCP ecosystem from the start rather than treating it as an afterthought. All MCP servers use a set of shared library functions that provide logging for inputs and outputs, invocation counts, exception tracing, and other telemetry out of the box. This is part of the server framework itself, so teams get observability for free when they use the unified deployment pipeline.

测量 Pinterest 从一开始就将可观察性构建到了 MCP 生态系统中，而不是将其视为事后的想法。所有 MCP 服务器都使用一组共享库函数，这些函数提供输入和输出日志记录、调用计数、异常跟踪和其他开箱即用的遥测。这是服务器框架本身的一部分，因此团队在使用统一部署管道时可以免费获得可观察性。

At the ecosystem level, Pinterest tracks the number of registered servers and tools, invocation counts across all servers, and a north-star metric that rolls everything up into a single number. That number is the time saved. For each tool, server owners provide a “minutes saved per invocation” estimate, based on lightweight user feedback and comparison to the prior manual workflow.

在生态系统层面，Pinterest 跟踪注册服务器和工具的数量、所有服务器的调用计数以及将所有内容汇总为一个数字的北极星指标。这个数字就是节省的时间。对于每个工具，服务器所有者根据轻量级用户反馈以及与之前的手动工作流程的比较，提供“每次调用节省的分钟数”估计。

Multiplied by invocation counts, this gives an order-of-magnitude view of impact.

乘以调用次数，即可得出影响的数量级视图。

As of January 2025, MCP servers at Pinterest were handling 66,000 invocations per month across 844 monthly active users. Using the owner-provided estimates, MCP tools were saving on the order of approximately 7,000 hours per month.

截至 2025 年 1 月，Pinterest 的 MCP 服务器每月处理 844 名每月活跃用户的 66,000 次调用。根据业主提供的估算，MCP 工具每月可节省约 7,000 小时的时间。

Conclusion Pinterestʼs MCP ecosystem offers a clear blueprint for organizations building AI agents that need to act on internal systems. The pattern they established, a standard protocol, a central registry, layered auth, a unified deployment pipeline, and built-in observability, is transferable well beyond Pinterestʼs specific context.

结论 Pinterest 的 MCP 生态系统为构建需要对内部系统采取行动的 AI 代理的组织提供了清晰的蓝图。他们建立的模式、标准协议、中央注册表、分层身份验证、统一部署管道和内置可观察性，可以远远超出 Pinterest 的特定上下文。

The most important lesson is where the effort actually went. The MCP protocol gave Pinterest a shared language between AI surfaces and tools. That was necessary but far from sufficient. The registry, auth layers, deployment pipeline, and measurement framework are what turned a promising protocol into a production system handling tens of thousands of invocations per month.

最重要的教训是努力的实际去向。 MCP 协议为 Pinterest 提供了 AI 界面和工具之间的共享语言。这是必要的，但还远远不够。注册表、身份验证层、部署管道和测量框架将一个有前景的协议转变为每月处理数万次调用的生产系统。

To conclude, Pinterestʼs approach suggests a practical starting point of seeding a small set of high-leverage MCP servers that solve real pain points, then invest in the platform work, especially the deployment pipeline, that makes it easy for other

总而言之，Pinterest 的方法提出了一个实际的起点，即播种一小组高杠杆 MCP 服务器来解决真正的痛点，然后投资于平台工作，特别是部署管道，这使得其他人可以轻松地

Page 95

teams to build on top. Pinterestʼs unified pipeline was the unlock that turned a platform team project into an org-wide ecosystem.

团队在此基础上进行构建。 Pinterest 的统一管道是将平台团队项目转变为组织范围内的生态系统的解锁。
